ComingSoon.title: Coming soon
ComingSoon.body: This page will go live soon. In the meantime, please get in touch with any questions.

Calculator.heading: Get an indicative price.
Calculator.sub: Pick your project type and quality tier. You'll see an estimated range instantly.
Calculator.m2Help: Gross floor area for a full renovation, added area for an extension.
Calculator.btwExplanation: Prices are ex. VAT. The standard rate is 21% VAT on both labour and materials. A 9% reduced rate applies to labour on painting, plastering, wallpapering, insulation and cleaning in homes older than two years (materials stay at 21%). Your final quote splits VAT per line.
Calculator.snapshotNote: Estimates based on our own product database, refreshed quarterly. Last updated: {date}.
Calculator.chooseProjectFirst: Pick a project type above to see the estimate.
Calculator.enterM2First: Enter a surface area in m².
Calculator.perM2Note: per m² — multiply by your area

Form.name: Name
Form.attachmentHelp: PDF with floor plan or requirements — max 10 MB.
Form.privacyConsent: I agree to the Tripod BV privacy policy.
Form.successBody: Your message has been sent. We'll respond within one working day.
Form.urgentNote: In a hurry? Call or WhatsApp us directly: +31 6 1437 4866.
Form.disabled: The form will be live soon — for now, please contact us directly.
Form.pdfOnly: PDF files up to 10 MB only.
Form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
Form.errorRateLimit: Too many messages from this address. Please try again in an hour.
Form.fromCalculatorNote: You're coming from the calculator — we've pre-filled your choices.
